channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Street Light not working, 29th June
item.description:
Opposite no 75
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 73, Cleevelands Avenue, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drains blocked causing disgusting sewage smell, 29th June
item.description:
On Rodney Road outside the children’s nursery ‘Hickory Dickories’ and a red brick garage. The drains are very pungent smelling of sewage waste. I think the drains are blocked as the smell seems to be getting worse especially since the extreme heat conditions.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Rodney Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A large quantity of fly tipping is obstructing a small carpark and spoiling the natural beauty of the common., 29th June
item.description:
The longer this goes without removal the more the litter and debris is being blown by the wind into Wardens Wood and the SSSI Cleeve Common. It is spoiling an area of outstanding natural beauty.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Lane, Sevenhampton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead tree and fallen tree, 29th June
item.description:
Dead tree could potentially fall down and fallen tree has fallen onto fence on property boundary to the side of house, tree that has fallen onto fence has been cut back but still resting on fence.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M5, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose cover, 29th June
item.description:
A tractor brushed the pavement and this metal cover flew 5 feet into the air and missed my 6 year old daughter by about 2 metres. It’s not appropriate for being so close to a drop kerb as people keep driving over it. It should be removed or covered over with a kerb stone and the drain relocated. It’s very unsafe.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alderton Road, Gretton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No timetable, 29th June
item.description:
There is no timetable at the stop before Sainsbury’s

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped shopping trolleys, 29th June
item.description:
The nearer one belongs to Waitrose, the further one to Aldi.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 91, Brooklyn Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Previous Reports, 29th June
item.description:
Previously reported defective areas outside 11,10, 9 Cousley Close Saw the highways man today come, not look at any of the defects, stood beside number 13 watching cricket on an iPad and did not come across to 11,10,9
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cousley Close, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Style blocked by brambles, 29th June
item.description:
The style st dangerous because of overgrowth of brambles likely to cause injury

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Betula Close, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement not renewed, 29th June
item.description:
Hi, in the last month the entire pavement area in the whole of Milton rd Cheltenham has been renewed with the only exception of the area just in front of my house (45 Milton rd, GL51 7EU) Can you please let me know why? As site manager at the time assured me that it was included in their plans… Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Milton Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 29th June
item.description:
The square chair joined the mound that has been there all weekend. This is the EIGHTH time rubbish had been dumped here in the last 2 weeks. Why do the decent local people have to put up with the illegal behaviour of a few locals who have zero civic pride??

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Pates Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 29th June
item.description:
3 months road closure please refresh give way markings markings approx x12 600x150mm dots plus x2 3 meters lines (Faded Road Markings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 29th June
item.description:
3 months road closure please refresh stop markings approx 5 meters line plus x1 4 meters line (Faded Road Markings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 29th June
item.description:
Rocking unstable slab Please lift and relay x 3 600x600mm x 3 Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 29th June
item.description:
Broken slabs Please lift and replace x 6 900x600mm x 6 Standard TM with temp fw closure Stats Cutting required (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 29th June
item.description:
Rocking unstable slab Please lift and relay 760x600mm Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats Cutting may be required (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 29th June
item.description:
Broken slab Please lift and replace 760x600mm Standard TM with temp fw closure Stats Cutting may be required (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 29th June
item.description:
Overgrown Hedge/ Vegetation Please cutback to boundary Approx 100m in length 2-Way Traffic Lights (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 29th June
item.description:
Overgrown Hedge Please cutback to boundary Approx 50m in length 2-Way Traffic Lights (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 29th June
item.description:
Give and take temporary footway closure 28 day please cut back overgrown tree growth approx 5000x3000 meters from footway/carriage way (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet
